Tail Plant.canonical_display_pose: Skateboard flat on the ground; rear shoe on the short tail behind the rear truck; other shoe on the ground; no shoe on the nose or between the trucks.

Pop-Up Ready.canonical_display_pose: Surfer and surfboard travel on one shared axis; both feet are supported by the deck, with rear foot over the tail pad and front foot across the centerline; no foot floats beside the board.
required_checks: hips and shoulders aligned with board travel
athlete and board face the same direction

Binding Check.canonical_display_pose: Snowboard lies flat while the athlete crouches beside it with both boots outside the bindings and both hands checking the nearest binding; no crossed leg and no boot entering the opposite-side binding.
